class.name: PlayFabUsers
class.brief_description: Manual PlayFab sign-in and cached user lookup service.
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.users[/code]. Use this service to manually sign a local Xbox user or title-defined custom id into PlayFab and inspect cached [PlayFabUser] sessions. For Xbox-backed sign-in, reuse [code]GDK.users.get_primary_user()[/code] when available or await [code]GDK.users.add_user_with_ui_async()[/code] to acquire a signed-in [code]GDKUser[/code], then pass that object to [method sign_in_with_xuser_async]. Never pass a raw local Xbox user id.

method.name: sign_in_with_xuser_async
method.description: Starts PlayFab sign-in for the specified signed-in [code]GDKUser[/code]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [PlayFabResult] data contains the signed-in [PlayFabUser]. A typical acquisition path is [code]var gdk_user = GDK.users.get_primary_user()[/code] and, if that returns [code]null[/code], [code]gdk_user = (await GDK.users.add_user_with_ui_async()).data[/code]. Never pass a raw local Xbox user id. Failure codes include [code]not_initialized[/code], [code]platform_unsupported[/code], [code]invalid_xuser[/code], and [code]xuser_not_found[/code].

method.name: sign_in_with_custom_id_async
method.description: Starts PlayFab sign-in using a title-defined custom id. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [PlayFabResult] data contains a [PlayFabUser] with [member PlayFabUser.custom_id] populated and no local Xbox user handle. Failure codes include [code]invalid_custom_id[/code] and [code]not_initialized[/code].

method.name: get_user_by_local_id
method.description: Returns the cached [PlayFabUser] for the given local id, or [code]null[/code] if there is no cached session.

method.name: get_user_by_custom_id
method.description: Returns the cached [PlayFabUser] for the given custom id, or [code]null[/code] if there is no cached custom-ID session.

method.name: get_user
method.description: Returns a cached [PlayFabUser] from either a local id or a [PlayFabUser] object.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns an [Array] of cached signed-in [PlayFabUser] objects.
